goal: Yrkesroll: Visual inspector (ONET SOC 51-9061, Inspectors/Testers/Sorters/Samplers/Weighers — surface-defect / label-integrity inspection lane variant). A Franka arm picks cubes one at a time off an infeed conveyor in front of an overhead inspection camera. add_vision_classifier_gate classifies each cube as 'pass' (intact blue label) or 'reject' (visible red defect mark) using semantic class labels routed to the classifier. Pass items go to GoodBin; reject items go to RejectBin. Four cubes arrive: three blue-labelled 'good' parts and one red-marked 'defect' part. Exercises the vision-classifier-as-gate pattern + 2-bin pass/reject routing on the SEMANTIC axis (defect class), which is the foundational visual-inspection workflow. Distinct from CP-NEW-yrkesroll-quality-tech-fixture-gauge (raycast laser-displacement GAUGE measuring physical height — dimensional defect) by using a vision classifier as the discrimination modality (semantic defect — surface mark / colour anomaly / label integrity), which a quality-tech-gauge canonical explicitly cannot detect. Distinct from CP-NEW-kit-prep-vision-gate (vision-gate verifies completeness — was every slot filled — not pass/reject of individual workpieces) and CP-NEW-barcode-scanner-divert (sensor=barcode reader returning SKU string, not vision classifier; 3 lanes not 2).
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-yrkesroll-inspector-reject-divert:

1) Yrkesroll framing — Visual inspector (ONET SOC 51-9061, Inspectors/Testers/Sorters/Samplers/Weighers) per backlog entry yrkesroll-inspector-reject-divert-001 (pattern_hint=sort). Role represents the human's intent: visually examine each arriving part for surface defects or label damage and divert defective items to the reject lane. The actual handling is performed by a Franka arm standing in for the inspector's pick-and-place motions; the overhead camera + vision classifier stand in for the human's eyes + cognitive defect-recognition.

2) DIFFERENTIATION FROM A78 (CP-NEW-yrkesroll-quality-tech-fixture-gauge) — this is the crucial design axis at retrieval time. A78 uses raycast as a laser-displacement GAUGE measuring physical Z-height of the part (dimensional out-of-tolerance → reject). A87 uses VISION CLASSIFICATION on a SEMANTIC defect (surface red-mark vs intact blue label → reject). A quality-tech-gauge canonical can ONLY detect dimensional defects; a visual-inspector canonical can detect semantic / appearance defects that a gauge cannot. Both use 2-bin pass/reject + sort pattern + Franka pick-place, but the SENSOR modality and the FAILURE-CLASS being detected are orthogonal. Both share yrkesroll-axis (inspector vs quality-tech) under the broader ONET 51-9061 family.

3) Topology — single inspection station: infeed conveyor in front (y=+0.40), overhead inspection camera at z=1.30 pointing down at conveyor pick zone [0.0, 0.40, 0.78], GoodBin behind-left (x=-0.35, y=-0.45), RejectBin behind-right (x=+0.35, y=-0.45). Franka at [0,0,0.75] on a 0.75m table; all geometry within Franka's ~0.85m reach.

4) Four cubes arrive on the conveyor in fixed order: Cube_1 (good, blue label), Cube_2 (good, blue label), Cube_3 (REJECT, red defect mark), Cube_4 (good, blue label). Cubes all 0.05m. Visual differentiation is via material colour assigned to the cube surface (blue for good, red for defect). Semantic labels are pre-assigned ('pass_part' vs 'reject_part') so the vision classifier has ground truth; in production the labels would be the classifier output.

5) Vision-classifier gate — add_vision_classifier_gate(cube_paths=[Cube_1..Cube_4], class_labels=['pass_part', 'reject_part'], camera_path=/World/InspectCamera, destination_map={'pass_part': '/World/GoodBin', 'reject_part': '/World/RejectBin'}). The gate captures the viewport, runs vision_detect_objects against the labels, and returns a cube→destination dict suitable for setup_pick_place_controller's color_routing argument. This is the canonical exemplar for sensor=vision_classifier sort (vs sensor=raycast_gauge in A78, vs sensor=barcode_reader in CP-NEW-barcode-scanner-divert).

6) Overhead camera — placed at [0.0, 0.40, 1.30] directly above the conveyor pick zone, looking straight down via set_camera_look_at(target=[0.0, 0.40, 0.78]). focal_length=18mm gives wide FOV covering the full 0.30m belt width plus ~0.40m belt length so all 4 cubes are visible in one capture frame. configure_camera() creates and parameterises the camera prim; set_camera_params() refines focal length; set_camera_look_at() orients gaze.

7) Pick-place sequencing — PHASE 1: add_vision_classifier_gate runs once, returning the routing decision per cube. PHASE 2: setup_pick_place_controller is dispatched ONCE with source_paths=[all 4 cubes] and color_routing built from the gate result. The controller picks each cube in order, looks up its class in color_routing, and routes to the matching bin. PHASE 3: get_world_transform on each cube to verify it reached the expected bin. This matches CP-NEW-inspect-reject (predecessor draft) and CP-48 (color-routing precedent) wiring.

8) Why 2 bins not 3 — visual inspection routing is binary pass/reject by definition (defective parts go to disposition; non-defective parts continue downstream). Adding a 'rework' lane is a scenario-profile extension; the foundational template enforces the simplest discriminating routing axis (semantic_class: pass vs reject).

9) Physics: CPU deterministic (enable_gpu_dynamics=False, MBP broadphase) for determinism. sleepThreshold=0.0 on parts; rubber material for stable friction on the moving belt during the brief camera capture window.

10) Distinct structural tags: isaac:yrkesroll.inspector (new yrkesroll-axis tag tying to ONET SOC 51-9061 — visual inspection variant; distinct from isaac:yrkesroll.quality_tech in A78 which is dimensional inspection), isaac:industry.visual_inspection (distinct from isaac:industry.quality_inspection in A78), isaac:routing.pass_reject_2lane (shared with A78 — same routing topology), isaac:sensor.vision_classifier (distinct from isaac:sensor.gauge_raycast in A78), isaac:vision.inspect_and_reject, isaac:robot.franka.

11) Verification — verify_args.stages encodes the single multi-pick stage with routed_bins=[GoodBin, RejectBin]; simulate_args.routed_target_paths = [GoodBin, RejectBin]; per_bin_expected = {good: 3, reject: 1}. Choosing per_bin_expected gives the simulator a counted check that the canonical correctly routes 3 pass cubes to GoodBin and 1 reject cube to RejectBin.

12) Motion-controller honesty — verified=[]; untested=['curobo', 'rmpflow']; failed={}. Smoke test pending — function-gate runs after form-gate lint passes.
code:
# -- Scene skeleton --------------------------------------------------------
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# -- Physics: CPU deterministic --------------------------------------------
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# -- Robot table -----------------------------------------------------------
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.2, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# -- Franka arm ------------------------------------------------------------
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# -- Infeed inspection conveyor (front, y=+0.40) ---------------------------
# Belt top z = 0.78 + 0.025 = 0.805; cube centre z = 0.805 + 0.025 = 0.830.
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/InspectionBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.40, 0.78],
    size=[1.5, 0.30, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.08, 0, 0],
)

# -- Materials: blue=intact-label (good), red=defect-mark (reject) ---------
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/LabelBlue",  shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.10, 0.25, 0.95])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/DefectRed", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.95, 0.10, 0.10])

# -- Destination bins (behind robot, y=-0.45) ------------------------------
# Within Franka 0.85m reach: max horizontal = sqrt(0.35^2 + 0.45^2) = 0.57m.
create_bin(prim_path="/World/GoodBin",   position=[-0.35, -0.45, 0.75], size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.12])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/RejectBin", position=[ 0.35, -0.45, 0.75], size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.12])

# -- 4 cubes on belt: 3 good (blue label) + 1 reject (red defect mark) -----
# Spacing 0.20m; belt velocity 0.08 m/s -> ~2.5s gap between cubes at pick zone.
_cube_specs = [
    {"path": "/World/Cube_1", "x": -0.60, "label": "pass_part",   "material": "/World/Materials/LabelBlue"},
    {"path": "/World/Cube_2", "x": -0.40, "label": "pass_part",   "material": "/World/Materials/LabelBlue"},
    {"path": "/World/Cube_3", "x": -0.20, "label": "reject_part", "material": "/World/Materials/DefectRed"},
    {"path": "/World/Cube_4", "x":  0.00, "label": "pass_part",   "material": "/World/Materials/LabelBlue"},
]
cube_paths = []
for spec in _cube_specs:
    p = spec["path"]
    cube_paths.append(p)
    create_prim(prim_path=p, prim_type="Cube", position=[spec["x"], 0.40, 0.830], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=p, schema_name=api)
    assign_material(prim_path=p, material_path=spec["material"])
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=p, class_name=spec["label"])
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=p, material_name="rubber")

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=cube_paths, attr="physics:mass", value=0.25)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=cube_paths, attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)

# -- Overhead inspection camera --------------------------------------------
# Nadir view of conveyor pick zone at z=1.30; wide FOV covers all 4 cubes.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/InspectCamera", prim_type="Camera")
set_camera_params(
    camera_path="/World/InspectCamera",
    params={"focal_length": 18.0, "horizontal_aperture": 20.955},
)
set_camera_look_at(
    camera_path="/World/InspectCamera",
    target=[0.0, 0.40, 0.78],
    eye=[0.0, 0.40, 1.30],
)

# -- PHASE 1: vision-classifier gate ---------------------------------------
# Captures viewport from /World/InspectCamera, runs vision_detect_objects with
# the two semantic class labels, and returns a cube->destination dict shaped
# for setup_pick_place_controller's color_routing argument.
add_vision_classifier_gate(
    cube_paths=cube_paths,
    class_labels=["pass_part", "reject_part"],
    camera_path="/World/InspectCamera",
    destination_map={
        "pass_part":   "/World/GoodBin",
        "reject_part": "/World/RejectBin",
    },
)

# -- PHASE 2: pick-place with semantic-class routing -----------------------
# color_routing keys are the semantic class labels emitted by the vision gate.
# Items classified pass_part -> GoodBin; reject_part -> RejectBin.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=cube_paths,
    destination_path="/World/GoodBin",
    color_routing={
        "pass_part":   "/World/GoodBin",
        "reject_part": "/World/RejectBin",
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/InspectionBelt",
                        "/World/GoodBin", "/World/RejectBin"],
)

# -- PHASE 3: verify routing -----------------------------------------------
for p in cube_paths:
    get_world_transform(prim_path=p)
failure_modes: add_vision_classifier_gate returns low-confidence classification for the red defect cube — if the classifier confidence threshold is too low, a defect-marked cube can be misrouted to GoodBin (false positive: defective product reaches downstream). Mitigation: enforce a min_confidence threshold inside the gate handler, or fall back to set_semantic_label ground truth when confidence < threshold. Real-world QA failure mode: insufficient training data on rare defects shrinks the rejection rate at the cost of escapes.

Defect not in classifier training distribution — vision classifier was trained on a fixed defect taxonomy (red mark / missing label / colour anomaly). Novel defects (cracks, scratches, wrong-shape) classify as pass_part because no reject_part visual pattern matches. Mitigation: scenario-profile may add a fall-through 'unknown' class routed to a Manual Review bin (3rd lane); foundational canonical does not include this.

Inspector role confused with quality-tech-gauge at retrieval — both canonicals share yrkesroll-axis ONET 51-9061 + 2-bin pass/reject routing + Franka pick-place. The discriminating structural_tag is isaac:sensor.vision_classifier (A87) vs isaac:sensor.gauge_raycast (A78). Retrieval MUST honour the sensor-modality tag, else the wrong canonical may be picked for a user prompt that says 'measure dimensions' (A78) vs 'check for surface defects' (A87).

Lighting changes affect classifier reliability — overhead DomeLight intensity 1000.0 is the baseline; if scenario varies dome intensity in a DR pass the vision classifier may misread defect colour. Mitigation: pin DomeLight intensity for canonical-build, allow scenario_profile to vary it later and observe classifier degradation. This canonical does NOT add a domain-randomizer; that is a scenario-profile extension.

Vision-classifier viewport capture race — add_vision_classifier_gate captures the current viewport. If the camera viewport was not yet committed to /World/InspectCamera when the gate fires, capture returns the default camera view (no cubes visible) and classifier emits an empty result. Mitigation: configure_camera + set_camera_look_at are dispatched BEFORE add_vision_classifier_gate so the viewport is bound to the inspection camera before capture. Verify by checking the gate result returns non-empty cube_to_destination.

Cube colour signal too weak for vision classifier — class_labels=['pass_part', 'reject_part'] are abstract; the classifier needs a visual cue (blue vs red surface). Materials must be applied (assign_material) BEFORE the gate runs so the cube surface colour is rendered. If a cube has no material assigned its default grey makes it ambiguous to the classifier. Mitigation: every cube has assign_material(mat_label_blue OR mat_defect_red) before the gate is dispatched.

color_routing requires the routing key to match the class label emitted by the gate — if add_vision_classifier_gate returns 'PassPart' (mixed case) but color_routing key is 'pass_part' (lowercase), the lookup misses and the cube falls through to destination_path (/World/GoodBin) — which silently routes the defective cube to the good bin. Mitigation: both labels normalised to snake_case lowercase; gate handler enforces label canonicalisation.

workpieces.note: Mix of pass + reject; at least one of each required for meaningful routing test

operator_role.title: Visual Inspector / Quality Control Inspector
operator_role.onet_soc_title: Inspectors, Testers, Sorters, Samplers, and Weighers
operator_role.onet_soc_note: 51-9061 is the ONET match for hands-on visual inspection of surface defects and label integrity (semantic / appearance discrimination). This is the SAME parent role as A78 (yrkesroll-quality-tech-fixture-gauge) but a distinct work variant: A78 measures dimensions via gauge, A87 inspects appearance via vision. Both legitimately fall under 51-9061; the discrimination at retrieval is via structural_tags isaac:yrkesroll.inspector vs isaac:yrkesroll.quality_tech and isaac:sensor.vision_classifier vs isaac:sensor.gauge_raycast.

code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.2, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{infeed_conveyor.path}},
    position={{infeed_conveyor.position}},
    size={{infeed_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{infeed_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/LabelBlue",  shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.10, 0.25, 0.95])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/DefectRed", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.95, 0.10, 0.10])
create_bin(prim_path={{good_bin.path}},   position={{good_bin.position}},   size={{good_bin.size}})
create_bin(prim_path={{reject_bin.path}}, position={{reject_bin.position}}, size={{reject_bin.size}})
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsRigidBodyAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsMassAPI")
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_path={{workpieces[0].material}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, class_name={{workpieces[0].label}})
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_name="rubber")
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsRigidBodyAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsMassAPI")
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, material_path={{workpieces[1].material}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, class_name={{workpieces[1].label}})
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, material_name="rubber")
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.05)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsRigidBodyAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsMassAPI")
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, material_path={{workpieces[2].material}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, class_name={{workpieces[2].label}})
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, material_name="rubber")
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, size=0.05)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsRigidBodyAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name="PhysicsMassAPI")
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, material_path={{workpieces[3].material}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, class_name={{workpieces[3].label}})
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, material_name="rubber")
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}], attr="physics:mass", value=0.25)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
create_prim(prim_path={{inspect_camera.path}}, prim_type="Camera")
set_camera_params(
    camera_path={{inspect_camera.path}},
    params={"focal_length": {{inspect_camera.focal_length}}, "horizontal_aperture": 20.955},
)
set_camera_look_at(
    camera_path={{inspect_camera.path}},
    target={{inspect_camera.target}},
    eye={{inspect_camera.position}},
)
add_vision_classifier_gate(
    cube_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    class_labels=[{{good_bin.routing_key}}, {{reject_bin.routing_key}}],
    camera_path={{inspect_camera.path}},
    destination_map={{{good_bin.routing_key}}: {{good_bin.path}}, {{reject_bin.routing_key}}: {{reject_bin.path}}},
)
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    destination_path={{good_bin.path}},
    color_routing={{{good_bin.routing_key}}: {{good_bin.path}}, {{reject_bin.routing_key}}: {{reject_bin.path}}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{infeed_conveyor.path}}, {{good_bin.path}}, {{reject_bin.path}}],
)
get_world_transform(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}})
get_world_transform(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}})
get_world_transform(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}})
get_world_transform(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}})
extension_notes: Sister canonical to CP-NEW-yrkesroll-quality-tech-fixture-gauge (A78). Same ONET SOC 51-9061 parent role, same 2-bin pass/reject routing topology, same Franka pick-place mechanics. DISTINCT sensor modality: vision_classifier (A87) vs gauge_raycast (A78); DISTINCT defect class detected: semantic/appearance defect (A87) vs dimensional out-of-tolerance (A78). Retrieval discrimination via structural_tags isaac:sensor.vision_classifier vs isaac:sensor.gauge_raycast and isaac:yrkesroll.inspector vs isaac:yrkesroll.quality_tech. Scenario-profile extensions: add a 3rd 'manual review' lane for low-confidence classifications, add domain-randomizer for lighting/colour DR pass, swap defect-marker material for label-occlusion (tape) for label-integrity inspection variant.
